allow: Bash(git check-ignore frontend/package.json frontend/vercel.json frontend/tsconfig.json frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml frontend/messages/en.json frontend/messages/fr.json frontend/next.config.ts)
Bash(git rm --cached frontend/public/apple-touch-icon.png frontend/public/favicon.png frontend/public/og-image.png frontend/public/images/login-bg.png frontend/public/images/signup-bg.png)

Bash(git add .gitattributes .gitignore frontend/.gitignore frontend/package.json frontend/tsconfig.json frontend/vercel.json frontend/messages/en.json frontend/messages/fr.json frontend/public/apple-touch-icon.png frontend/public/favicon.png frontend/public/og-image.png frontend/public/images/login-bg.png frontend/public/images/signup-bg.png)
Bash(git add --renormalize frontend/public/apple-touch-icon.png frontend/public/favicon.png frontend/public/og-image.png frontend/public/images/login-bg.png frontend/public/images/signup-bg.png)
